title: Add New Task
user_story: As a user, I want to add a new task to my list, so that I can capture things I need to do.
acceptance_criteria: A text input field and an 'Add' button are visible on the main page.
Entering text and clicking 'Add' creates a new item in the todo list.
The input field clears automatically after successful submission.
Submitting empty or whitespace-only text does not create a new item.

title: View Task List
user_story: As a user, I want to see all my tasks in a clear list, so that I can review what needs to be done.
acceptance_criteria: The page displays a scrollable list of all added todos.
Each todo shows its full text content clearly and legibly.
Newly added todos appear at the top of the list immediately.
The list updates dynamically without requiring a manual page refresh.

title: Mark Task as Complete or Incomplete
user_story: As a user, I want to mark tasks as done or undone, so that I can track my progress.
acceptance_criteria: Each todo item includes a clickable checkbox or toggle control.
Clicking the control changes the visual state (e.g., strikethrough text or muted color).
The completion status persists correctly across page interactions within the session.
Toggling the control again restores the original appearance and active status.

title: Remove Task from List
user_story: As a user, I want to delete tasks from my list, so that I can keep it clean and focused.
acceptance_criteria: Each todo item displays a visible 'Delete' button or icon.
Clicking the delete control removes the item immediately from the view.
The remaining todos shift smoothly to fill the gap without layout breaks.
Deleted items cannot be recovered within the current session.
